CONTENT.Club career: On 28 November 2017, Mandas made his professional debut in Greek Cup against Sparta. On 30 September 2019, he signed a contract extension until the summer of 2022, with a buy-out clause of €2,000,000.On 31 January 2022, OFI officially announced the signing of Mandas until the summer of 2026.On 1 September 2023, Mandas officially joined Serie A club Lazio for an undisclosed fee.
CONTENT.External links: Profile at the SS Lazio websiteChristos Mandas – UEFA competition record (archive)
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 12 May 2024As of match played 11 June 2024
CONTENT.International career: Mandas made his debut for the Greece national team on 11 June 2024 in a friendly against Malta in Grödig, Austria. He substituted Konstantinos Tzolakis in the 82nd minute of Greece's 2–0 victory.

SUMMARY: Christos Mandas (Greek: Χρήστος Μανδάς; born 17 September 2001) is a Greek professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Serie A club Lazio and the Greece national team.
